gauge.name: Black Fork Mohican River above Charles Mills Dam

impacts.statement: State Route 42, intersection of Mans-Adarid Road and Adams Road, State Route 430 west of Charles Mill Park all flooded.
Multiple intersections flooded including Charles Road and Black Fork, State Route 603 north of Mifflin, Pavonia Road east of Brown Road, Trout Drive.
Multiple intersections flooded including Hale Road, Township Road, 1688 and 1488 and State Route 430 east of State Route 603.
Many portions of Black Fork flooded including the intersections of Charles Road, Vantilberg, and Adams Road.
State Highway Route 430 at the west edge of Mifflin flooded.
State Route 603 north of new US Route 30 flooded.
Intersection of Windsor Road and Black Fork Road flooded.
Ashland County Road 1217, also known as South Peninsula Cottage Road, is impassable.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
